title: New India Assurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: New India Assurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
